title: stelis minuscula
intro: Stelis minuscula, also known as the miniature Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central America and Mexico, characterized by its tiny flowers and delicate appearance. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis minuscula include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Stelis minuscula typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
